meanings.definition: throw out of balance or equilibrium
examples: The tax relief unbalanced the budget
The prima donna unbalances the smooth work in our department

meanings.definition: derange mentally, throw out of mental balance; make insane
examples: The death of his parents unbalanced him

meanings.definition: being or thrown out of equilibrium

examples: a man who had gone mad

meanings.definition: debits and credits are not equal
